label: Carbon_Monoxide
definition:
Variable Short Name: CO

Data Source:Center for Air, Climate, & Energy Solutions ( https://www.caces.us/data)

Spatial Scale: Census Block Group

Temporal Scale: 1-year

Years Available: 1979-2020

Model: Land use regression

Model Specification/Citation: For year-2015 and earlier: Kim S.-Y.; Bechle, M.; Hankey, S.; Sheppard, L.; Szpiro, A. A.; Marshall, J. D. 2020. "Concentrations of criteria pollutants in the contiguous U.S., 1979 – 2015: Role of prediction model parsimony in integrated empirical geographic regression." PLoS ONE 15(2); For years 2016 - 2020: T Lu, SY Kim, JD Marshall. "High-resolution geospatial database: national criteria-air-pollutant concentrations in the contiguous U.S., 2016–2020." Geoscience Data Journal. 2025, 12, e70005. https://doi.org/10.1002/gdj3.70005. e0228535. https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0228535.
